data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement of switching modality (in-person to remote if sick), but the evidence does not confirm that this functionality is implemented or operational. While the linked use case describes a scenario where a student switches to virtual due to illness, it does not provide concrete API reads or persisted state checks to confirm that this requirement is satisfied. Therefore, there is a clear gap in the evidence provided to support the requirement's coverage.
gaps: No evidence confirming the implementation of the modality switch functionality.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify the modality switch functionality.
